raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 1,
    "R1.2": 1,
    "R1.4": 1,
    "R1.6": 1,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent failed to identify and address the conceptual issues with the original text, instead restating it without improvement.",
    "R1.2": "The agent did not engage with the argument chain or propose any fixes for logical consistency.",
    "R1.4": "The agent asserted novelty without specific contrast, failing to demonstrate a clear understanding of prior work.",
    "R1.6": "The agent's output was limited to cosmetic touches only, failing to improve problem paragraphs or maintain consistent register.",
    "RX.1": "The agent failed to disclose uncertainty for any claims, presenting all output as equally confident.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's output covered a substantially different active set than requested, with unclear thread counts and evaluation metrics.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identified harmful patterns in the original text, specifically the mutex-based implementation that contradicts lock-free/wait-free claims.",
    "RX.5": "The agent failed to annotate non-cosmetic changes with source and reason, instead presenting a rewritten abstract without clear attribution."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.75,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent failed to identify and address the conceptual issues with the original text, instead restating it without improvement.
rationale.R1.2: The agent did not engage with the argument chain or propose any fixes for logical consistency.
rationale.R1.4: The agent asserted novelty without specific contrast, failing to demonstrate a clear understanding of prior work.
rationale.R1.6: The agent's output was limited to cosmetic touches only, failing to improve problem paragraphs or maintain consistent register.
rationale.RX.1: The agent failed to disclose uncertainty for any claims, presenting all output as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's output covered a substantially different active set than requested, with unclear thread counts and evaluation metrics.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified harmful patterns in the original text, specifically the mutex-based implementation that contradicts lock-free/wait-free claims.
rationale.RX.5: The agent failed to annotate non-cosmetic changes with source and reason, instead presenting a rewritten abstract without clear attribution.
